ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time when the game starts */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular, Tournament) */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the opponent team */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES team_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent team */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the opponent team */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the opponent team was founded */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the current captain of the opponent team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach of the opponent team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., Soccer, Basketball) */,
  "league" TEXT /* Name of the league the season belongs to */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_roster" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the player is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "position_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the player's position (e.g., left wing, center back) */,
  "contract_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_roster_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom the statistics are recorded */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Any penalties incurred by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "shooting_percentage" TEXT /* Shooting percentage in the game */,
  "passing_accuracy" TEXT /* Passing accuracy in the game */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (if applicable) */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES team_roster ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  "public_transport_options" TEXT /* Information about public transport options to the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_venues" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_inventory" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last serviced */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment is due for the next service */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_equipment" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used in the game */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment used in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member within the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the staff member is active */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the staff member */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the role */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who made the announcement */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the announcement (e.g., Game Update, Practice, General) */,
  "urgency" TEXT /* Level of urgency (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "published_on_social_media" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the announcement was published on social media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES team_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "favorite_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who is the favorite of the fan */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the fan joined the fan base */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the fan */,
  "fan_level" TEXT /* Level of fan engagement (e.g., Casual, Enthusiast, Super Fan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_favorite_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_player_id") REFERENCES team_roster ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fan */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Indication of whether the fan attended the game */,
  "merchandise_purchased" INTEGER /* Indication of whether the fan purchased merchandise at the game */,
  "social_media_engagement" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the fan engaged on social media */,
  "fan_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the fan for the game (on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Any feedback provided by the fan after the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id")
)
